overall.description: A hooded character with a red cross emblem explores a moonlit historic stone courtyard and garden area in a video game. The character walks past a fountain, through courtyards with other robed NPCs, up stone stairs, and reaches an elevated viewpoint overlooking a distant tower and landscape.

events.description: moving from dense tree cover into open fountain area
approaching illuminated tiered fountain with lantern light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit garden path toward a stone fountain

entered.detail: large leafy trees framing the path with branches overhead
illuminated traditional lantern post casting warm orange light
multi-level circular stone fountain with small candles floating in water
tall stone retaining wall covered in ivy and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a moonlit garden path surrounded by dense trees and stone walls. Warm lantern light illuminates the cobblestone path as the character approaches a tiered stone fountain adorned with floating candles.

events.description: exiting fountain area into open courtyard with visible NPCs
turning toward stone staircase on the left side of courtyard

agents.ego_description: navigating through the courtyard, passing other robed figures standing near the walls

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing and conversing near the courtyard wall

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading upward to the next level
wall-mounted iron lantern with warm glow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fountain behind, the character enters an open cobblestone courtyard where a few robed NPCs stand conversing. The character heads toward a stone staircase on the left, passing wall-mounted lanterns.

events.description: beginning ascent of stone stairs alongside the building wall
reaching top of stairs and emerging onto elevated terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs and walking along the elevated wall path

notable_agents.action: robed figure ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: low stone balustrade along the edge of the elevated walkway
small red wooden chest sitting against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs alongside a high wall, following another robed figure. At the top, the path continues along an elevated walkway with stone balustrades, passing a red wooden chest before emerging onto an upper terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand courtyard with classical stone building

events.description: entering main upper courtyard with large classical building
turning right to circle around the grand building

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper courtyard toward a grand stone building with classical columns

notable_agents.action: group of three robed figures walking ahead toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large two-story stone building with classical columns and triangular pediment
tall stone pillars supporting the building portico
burning fire basket on a stand illuminating the entrance area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a grand upper courtyard dominated by a large stone building with classical columns and a portico. The character follows a group of robed NPCs toward the building, passing burning fire baskets, then turns right to circle around the structure.

events.description: moving into open terrace with full moon visibility and reduced artificial light
beginning descent down stone stairs at the overlook

agents.ego_description: pausing at the overlook to view the moon and distant landscape, then descending stairs

entered.detail: tall stone tower visible in the distance against the night sky
bright full moon partially covered by clouds

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an elevated terrace offering a panoramic view of the night landscape. The full moon shines brightly above a distant stone tower. After pausing to observe the vista, the character begins descending stone stairs back toward the lower levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, moonlit garden through a series of ascending courtyards to a high panoramic overlook. It begins on a cobblestone path surrounded by dense trees and stone walls, moving past warm lanterns toward a tiered fountain adorned with floating candles. As the character leaves the fountain, the scene opens into a wider courtyard filled with conversing robed figures before the camera follows a path up a stone staircase and along an elevated walkway past a red wooden chest. The movement then expands into a grand upper courtyard dominated by a classical stone building with columns and burning fire baskets, circling the structure to reach a final elevated terrace. Finally, the view opens to a vast night landscape under a bright full moon and a distant stone tower before the camera begins to descend the stairs back toward the lower levels.
